Activate
Where the world’s best marketers
meet, learn, and build what’s next.
Most platforms react. Iterable
adapts
intelligently and
in
real time
.
Iterable is the AI customer engagement platform global brands trust to create experiences that drive growth across every channel.
Book a demo
Take a Tour
For brands that want to set the standard.
In the AI Era, customers don’t follow linear journeys – they move quickly between channels, devices, and moments of intent. Iterable helps thousands of marketing teams respond in real time, with a platform that learns, adapts, and improves every interaction.
Intelligence that improves decisions.
Real-time AI decisioning powered by customer behavior, context, and performance signals, so every message gets smarter over time.
Context that carries across every interaction.
Unify behavioral, product, and engagement data so every experience reflects what a customer actually cares about in the moment.
Infrastructure built
for growth.
Enterprise grade performance, reliability, and security, trusted by global brands running trillions of customer interactions.
Built to drive measurable growth.
Iterable combines powerful technology with the expertise and partnership teams need to create better
customer experiences and stronger business results.
INCREASE CUSTOMER LIFETIME VALUE
IMPROVE MARKETING EFFICIENCY
SCALE WITH CONFIDENCE
INCREASE CUSTOMER LIFETIME VALUE
IMPROVE MARKETING EFFICIENCY
SCALE WITH CONFIDENCE
Respond to customer intent with real-time, relevant experiences that strengthen engagement, retention, and loyalty.
300%
Increase on revenue
Run cross-channel engagement on infrastructure designed for reliability, performance, and continuous growth.
77%
increase in trading Volume
Give marketers direct control over audiences, journeys, and experimentation – reducing engineering dependency and accelerating execution.
12.5%
LOWER Resource
Cost
40%
Productivity
Improvement
Nova is Iterable’s intelligence layer – helping teams understand
what’s happening, adapt in real time, and improve performance across every interaction.
Nova insights
You set the strategy,
Nova moves the work forward.
Nova agents help teams build and optimize audiences, journeys, and campaigns faster, automating manual work so marketers can focus on strategy.
Nova Decisioning
Optimization without
losing control.
Nova continuously evaluates behavioral signals to determine the next
best action while keeping teams in control of goals and guardrails.
Nova Agents
Understand what’s working. What’s not.
But most importantly:
why
Nova surfaces the signals behind performance, helping teams
understand what’s driving results and where to focus next.
Slide 1
Slide 2
StanleyBlack&Decker
ClickUp
With sophisticated segmentation features, comprehensive journey capabilities, and an ability to integrate various data feeds in our marketing communications, Iterable allows us to effectively scale our campaigns through automation and personalization, helping us develop stronger, 1:1 connections with subscribers and a seamless cross-channel user experience.
Casey Malone
Director, CRM @The Athletic
Read the full story
→
Predictive Goals has been an absolute game-changer for our team, maximizing our efficiencies and accelerating time to value. We’ve seen the tangible benefits of AI on our business, and look forward to seeing the impact of Iterable’s new AI innovations.
Lisa Tulloch
Email Marketing Channel Manager, Redfin
Read the full story
→
Stanley Black & Decker shifted from broad retail blasts to individualized engagement. By leveraging Iterable Catalog to power dynamic product data, they achieved a 7% increase in e-commerce clicks and a massive 80% reduction in email templates.
Read the full story
→
ClickUp shifted from siloed productivity alerts to a cohesive retention strategy. By synchronizing cross-channel milestones, they achieved a 9% increase in net dollar retention and a 5% boost in their overall reactivation rate.
Read the full story
→
See Iterable in action.
Customer Stories
Learn how leading brands use Iterable to drive growth, efficiency, and customer loyalty.
Read more →
Analyst Recognition
See how leading analysts evaluate Iterable’s market position, innovation, and execution.
Read more →
Iterable Research
Get insights, benchmarks, and trend data to help shape your engagement strategy.
Read more →
Community
Learn from other marketers through the Iterable community, events, and expert-led programs.
Read more →
See how smarter engagement decisions happen in Iterable.
Book a demo
Iterable is the AI customer engagement platform built for enterprise scale, loved by teams, and trusted by global brands. It transforms data into action, powering intelligent, personalized experiences across every channel to drive measurable growth.

analysis.name: Iterable
analysis.tagline: AI Customer Engagement Platform for Real-Time, Personalized Experiences
analysis.value_proposition: Iterable is an AI-powered customer engagement platform that helps enterprise marketing teams orchestrate real-time, personalized cross-channel experiences at scale.
analysis.ideal_customer: Large B2C brands (retail, fintech, consumer apps, online marketplaces) with high-volume, multi-channel CRM needs and dedicated marketing operations teams

features.name: nova intelligence layer
features.description: Iterable's branded AI layer that powers insights, decisioning, and agentic automation across the platform
features.evidence_quote: Nova is Iterable's intelligence layer – helping teams understand what's happening, adapt in real time

features.name: nova agents
features.description: AI agents that automate building and optimizing audiences, journeys, and campaigns to reduce manual work
features.evidence_quote: Nova agents help teams build and optimize audiences, journeys, and campaigns faster, automating manual work

features.name: nova decisioning
features.description: Real-time next-best-action engine that evaluates behavioral signals to determine optimal message while respecting marketer-defined goals and guardrails
features.evidence_quote: Nova continuously evaluates behavioral signals to determine the next best action while keeping teams in control

features.name: nova insights
features.description: AI-driven performance analytics that surfaces signals behind results and directs team focus
features.evidence_quote: Nova surfaces the signals behind performance, helping teams understand what's driving results and where to focus next

features.name: predictive goals
features.description: AI feature that predicts and optimizes toward marketing goals, reducing time to value
features.evidence_quote: Predictive Goals has been an absolute game-changer for our team, maximizing our efficiencies and accelerating time to value

features.name: journey builder
features.description: Visual studio for constructing multi-step, multi-channel customer journeys with modular tiles
features.evidence_quote: Journeys Overview, Journey Components, Studio Basics

features.name: ai journey generation
features.description: Generate full journey workflows from AI based on marketing goals
features.evidence_quote: Generating a Journey with AI

features.name: journey tiles
features.description: Modular journey building blocks including Start, Message, Delay, Filter, User Update, and Integration tiles
features.evidence_quote: Start Tile, Message Tiles, Delay Tiles, Filter Tiles, User Update Tiles, Integration Tiles

features.name: journey live data
features.description: Real-time data access within journey execution for dynamic personalization
features.evidence_quote: Journey Live Data Overview

features.name: cross-channel campaign orchestration
features.description: Coordinate messaging across email, SMS, push, in-app, web, WhatsApp, and embedded channels in a single workflow
features.evidence_quote: cross-channel mileston… synchronizing cross-channel

features.name: blast campaigns
features.description: One-time broadcast campaigns sent to a defined audience segment
features.evidence_quote: Choosing an Audience for a Blast Campaign

features.name: segmentation
features.description: Audience segmentation engine supporting behavioral, profile, and engagement-based filters
features.evidence_quote: sophisticated segmentation features… Segmentation Overview

features.name: email channel
features.description: Full email campaign creation, sending, and deliverability management
features.evidence_quote: Email Setup, Sending Your First Email Campaign, Creating Email Templates

features.name: amp for email
features.description: Support for AMP-powered interactive email content
features.evidence_quote: AMP for Email Overview

features.name: sms
features.description: SMS campaign sending with opt-out management and compliance tooling
features.evidence_quote: SMS Overview, Iterable SMS Services, Best Practices for SMS Compliance

features.name: mobile push notifications
features.description: iOS and Android push notification campaigns via FCM and APNs
features.evidence_quote: Creating Push Notification Templates, Sending Push Notifications, Push Campaign Metrics

features.name: in-app messages
features.description: In-app messaging for mobile apps, including a mobile inbox experience
features.evidence_quote: In-App Messages Overview, In-App Messages and Mobile inbox

features.name: mobile inbox
features.description: Persistent in-app inbox for surfacing messages to mobile users on demand
features.evidence_quote: In-App Messages and Mobile inbox

features.name: in-browser messaging
features.description: Web-based in-app-style messaging delivered via Iterable's Web SDK
features.evidence_quote: In-Browser Messaging Overview, Adding Your Website to Iterable, Setting up Iterable's Web SDK

features.name: web push notifications
features.description: Browser-based push notifications via FCM
features.evidence_quote: Web Push Overview, Setting up Web Push Notifications, Creating Web Push Templates

features.name: whatsapp
features.description: WhatsApp messaging channel with template management, approvals, quality ratings, and sending
features.evidence_quote: WhatsApp Overview, Creating WhatsApp Templates, Managing WhatsApp Template Approvals

features.name: embedded messaging
features.description: Embeddable message placements within apps/websites with eligibility lists and placement configuration
features.evidence_quote: Embedded Messaging Overview, Defining Placements for Embedded Messages

features.name: catalog
features.description: Product/content catalog enabling dynamic item data to power personalized recommendations in messages
features.evidence_quote: Catalog Overview, Using Catalog, Catalog Items, Using Catalogs & Collections in Messages

features.name: catalog collections
features.description: Groupings of catalog items for filtering and targeting in message personalization
features.evidence_quote: Collections, Using Catalogs & Collections in Messages

features.name: data feeds
features.description: External web service data feeds integrated into templates for real-time dynamic content
features.evidence_quote: Data Feeds Overview, Creating a Data Feed Web Service, Using Data Feeds in Templates

features.name: handlebars templating
features.description: Handlebars-based personalization engine for dynamic content in message templates
features.evidence_quote: Handlebars Overview, Personalizing Templates with Handlebars, Handlebars Reference: Built-In Merge Tags

features.name: dynamic content builder
features.description: Visual UI for generating personalization merge tags without writing Handlebars manually
features.evidence_quote: Generating Merge Tags with Dynamic Content Builder

features.name: snippets
features.description: Reusable content blocks with variable support that can be embedded across multiple templates
features.evidence_quote: Snippets Overview, Creating and Managing Snippets, Customizing Snippets with Variables

features.name: wysiwyg editor
features.description: Drag-and-drop visual template editor for building email and other channel templates
features.evidence_quote: WYSIWYG Editor

features.name: side-by-side editor
features.description: Split-view template editor showing code and preview simultaneously
features.evidence_quote: Side by Side Editor

features.name: subscription preference centers
features.description: User-facing subscription preference management pages for opt-in/opt-out control
features.evidence_quote: Subscription Preference Centers Overview

features.name: lists management
features.description: Create, manage, and import user lists including CSV import
features.evidence_quote: Lists Overview, Adding Users and Creating Lists, CSV List Import Best Practices

features.name: user profiles
features.description: Individual user profile management with custom fields and profile field governance
features.evidence_quote: Managing User Profiles, Managing User Profile Fields in Iterable

features.name: unknown user activation
features.description: Capture and engage anonymous/unknown users before they identify, with configurable retention periods
features.evidence_quote: Unknown User Activation Overview, Unknown User Profile Creation, Segmenting Unknown Users

features.name: custom events
features.description: Define, manage, and use custom behavioral events with properties and configurable retention
features.evidence_quote: Events Overview, Managing Custom Events, Custom Event Properties, Managing Custom Event Retention

features.name: commerce events
features.description: Native e-commerce event tracking including shopping cart items and purchase events
features.evidence_quote: Managing Commerce Events and Shopping Cart Items, Iterable Commerce Event Properties

features.name: data schema management
features.description: Manage field data types, naming conventions, and schema structure for user and event data
features.evidence_quote: Data Schema Management Overview, Field Data Types, Best Practices for Field Names and Event Names

features.name: saml sso
features.description: SAML-based single sign-on with support for Azure, Google Workspace, and Okta
features.evidence_quote: SSO Setup for Common Providers (Azure, Google Workspace, Okta)

features.name: mfa
features.description: Multi-factor authentication for platform member accounts
features.evidence_quote: Managing and Resetting Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) for Iterable Members

features.name: google sign-in
features.description: OAuth-based Google account authentication option for platform login
features.evidence_quote: Authentication Options in Iterable: Username and Password, Google Sign-In, and SAML SSO

features.name: custom roles
features.description: Role-based access control with custom role definitions beyond default permissions
features.evidence_quote: Creating and Managing Custom Roles

features.name: member permissions
features.description: Granular user permission management for workspace members
features.evidence_quote: Members and Permissions Overview, Permissions for Using Iterable

features.name: multi-project workspaces
features.description: Support for multiple isolated projects within a single Iterable account with per-project settings
features.evidence_quote: Projects Overview, Project Types and Unique Identifiers, Project Settings

features.name: localization
features.description: Locale/language configuration for sending localized messages across campaigns and journeys
features.evidence_quote: Setting up Locales

features.name: https link tracking domains
features.description: Custom HTTPS domains for tracking email and message link clicks
features.evidence_quote: Configuring HTTPS for Link Tracking Domains

features.name: deep links
features.description: Deep link configuration for email and SMS to route users to specific in-app destinations
features.evidence_quote: Configuring Deep Links for Email or SMS

features.name: european data center
features.description: EU-based data residency option for customers requiring European data sovereignty
features.evidence_quote: Iterable's European Data Center (EDC)

features.name: email validation
features.description: Automated validation of user email addresses to maintain list hygiene
features.evidence_quote: Email Validation in Iterable

features.name: easy unsubscribe / list-unsubscribe headers
features.description: Compliant one-click unsubscribe headers for email deliverability and compliance
features.evidence_quote: Easy Unsubscribe and List-Unsubscribe Email Headers

features.name: dynamic sender emails
features.description: Use dynamic from-address values per campaign or user segment
features.evidence_quote: Using Dynamic Sender Emails in a Campaign

features.name: sms compliance tooling
features.description: SMS opt-out/resubscribe flows and compliance best practice enforcement
features.evidence_quote: Best Practices for SMS Compliance, SMS Unsubscribes and Resubscribes

features.name: journey performance monitoring
features.description: Built-in tools for tracking and optimizing journey engagement and performance
features.evidence_quote: Monitoring Journey Engagement, Optimizing Journey Performance

features.name: campaign modernization
features.description: Migration/upgrade path for updating legacy campaigns to modern campaign structures
features.evidence_quote: Campaign Modernization

features.name: real-time ai decisioning
features.description: Platform-level capability to evaluate and act on behavioral signals in real time without batch delays
features.evidence_quote: Real-time AI decisioning powered by customer behavior, context, and performance signals

features.name: behavioral and engagement data unification
features.description: Unify behavioral, product, and engagement data into a single customer context used across all interactions
features.evidence_quote: Unify behavioral, product, and engagement data so every experience reflects what a customer actually cares about

integrations: Firebase Cloud Messaging / FCM (mobile push, web push)
differentiators: Most platforms react. Iterable adapts intelligently and in real time.
Nova AI intelligence layer with agents, decisioning, and insights as first-party capabilities
Enterprise-grade infrastructure trusted by global brands running trillions of customer interactions
Marketers get direct control over audiences, journeys, and experimentation — reducing engineering dependency
Real-time behavioral signal processing rather than batch-based decision-making

praised: sophisticated segmentation features and comprehensive journey capabilities (Casey Malone, The Athletic)
ability to integrate various data feeds in marketing communications
Predictive Goals as a game-changer for efficiency and time to value (Lisa Tulloch, Redfin)
Catalog enabling dynamic product data, driving 7% e-commerce click increase and 80% template reduction (Stanley Black & Decker)

pricing.notes: Pricing page returned 404. All CTAs on the marketing site direct to 'Book a demo', indicating a fully sales-led motion with no self-serve or publicly listed pricing. Enterprise positioning throughout suggests high ACV contracts.
